summary:
Claim: Doctors or nurses disclosing a rape victim’s identity are punishable under Section 228A of the IPC.  
Evidence: - Section 228A prohibits any person from disclosing the identity of a victim of sexual assault without consent. - It applies specifically to medical professionals involved in treating such cases.  
Answer: A
